englishDefinitions: A nonstandard or misspelled form of crank up.
To increase something, especially volume, speed, or intensity.
persianTranslation: احتمالاً شکل غلطِ crank up؛ زیاد کردن
examples: Please cramk up the music a little.
If this is meant to be crank up, then it means to turn the volume up.
She told him to cramk up the heater because it was cold.
